evidence_sources.details: User provided import/load/infer entrypoints for the minimal repo-native path.
Base environment imports transformers 4.55.2 and exposes Qwen2VLForConditionalGeneration and AutoProcessor.
Escalated curl to the Hugging Face model page returned HTTP 200 on 2026-04-02.

notes: Phase-1 does not require a separate upstream git checkout because the validation target is the Hugging Face-hosted model ID exercised through repo-native Transformers entrypoints.
The missing qwen_vl_utils dependency and actual weight availability still need build-time/runtime verification.
